code_dossier.name: RolePermissionMapper.xml
code_dossier.description: MyBatis mapper XML configuration file for role-permission relationship data access, providing SQL query capabilities for fetching permission data based on role codes from the care platform database.

data.detailed_description:
This is a MyBatis mapper XML configuration file that serves as the Data Access Object (DAO) layer for the role-permission relationship management in the account management module. 

The file defines SQL mapping for the `RolePermissionMapper` interface located at `com.zixin.account.mapper.RolePermissionMapper`. It provides a single query operation `selectByRoleCodes` that retrieves role permission records from the `care_platform_role_permission` database table.

**Business Logic:**
The mapper enables the system to query all permissions associated with a given set of role codes. This is a fundamental operation in Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) systems, where users are assigned roles, and roles are mapped to specific permissions/actions. When the system needs to determine what actions a user can perform, it first retrieves the user's roles, then uses this mapper to fetch all associated permissions.

**Technical Implementation:**
- Uses MyBatis dynamic SQL with `<foreach>` to construct an IN clause for multiple role codes
- Returns `RolePermission` domain objects with fields: id, role_code, action_code, create_time
- Properly uses parameterized queries (#{code}) to prevent SQL injection

**Architecture Position:**
This component sits in the persistence layer of a typical layered architecture, specifically within the account-provider service of a microservices-based account management system. It interfaces between the service layer and the underlying database.
responsibilities: Query role-permission mappings from the database based on multiple role codes
Map database records to RolePermission domain objects
Support batch query operations for permission lookups in RBAC systems
Provide data access abstraction for the role-permission relationship table

interfaces.name: selectByRoleCodes

parameters.name: roleCodes
parameters.description: Collection of role codes to query permissions for

interfaces.description: Retrieves all role-permission records matching the provided role codes using SQL IN clause
